title: Asset/Project Library

posts.author: rchl (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking to see if there’s a way we can see all projects at once. We can sort, see status’, etc.

Right now I have a closed Connected/mirrored board with everything sync over, that people can search/sort/see reporting. Would be a lot easier if we just had a large library or database where everything is held.

Just an idea
